question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies who won at least one award and played in the Campbell Conference

plan.question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies who won at least one award and played in the Campbell Conference
plan.detail_query: SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname AS conference, ap.award FROM goalies g JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (ap.award IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname AS conference, ap.award
join_clauses: JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award
blocks.notes: This block returns goalies who won at least one award and played in the Campbell Conference, along with their goals against and games played.

blocks.name: root
blocks.select_clause: SELECT AVG(CAST(leaf_1.ga AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(leaf_1.gp, 0)) AS avg_ga_per_game
blocks.notes: This block calculates the average goals against per game for the goalies returned by the leaf block.

build_logs.notes: This block returns goalies who won at least one award and played in the Campbell Conference, along with their goals against and games played.

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (ap.award IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname AS conference, ap.award
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (ap.award IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average goals against per game for the goalies returned by the leaf block.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname AS conference, ap.award
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (ap.award IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(CAST(leaf_1.ga AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(leaf_1.gp, 0)) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname AS conference, ap.award
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN awardsplayers ap ON g.playerid = ap.playerid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (ap.award IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, a.fullname, ap.award) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average ratio of goals allowed to games played among all goalies in the Campbell Conference who received at least one award, calculated by first computing the ratio for each goalie in each year and then averaging those yearly ratios?
